user.title: Enable Banking Setup
user.description:
Enter your Enable Banking API credentials.

**How to get your credentials:**
1. Go to [{enablebanking_url}/cp/applications]({enablebanking_url}/cp/applications)
2. Choose **Sandbox** (for testing) or **Production**
3. Select **Generate in the browser** for the key
4. Enter an application name (e.g. "Home Assistant Finance")
5. Add your HA redirect URL: `{redirect_url}`
6. Click **Register** — your private key will download automatically
7. Copy the **Application ID** from the confirmation page

**Security:** Your credentials are encrypted and stored locally in Home Assistant.

After setup, open the **Finance** sidebar panel to connect your bank.

error.missing_credentials: Please enter both Application ID and Private Key.
error.invalid_key_format: The private key could not be loaded. Make sure you paste the complete PEM content including the -----BEGIN/END PRIVATE KEY----- lines.
error.invalid_credentials: Enable Banking rejected the credentials (HTTP 401/403). Verify that your Application ID matches the private key and the application is activated.
error.no_institutions: No banking institutions found for your country.
error.connection_failed: Connection to Enable Banking failed. Please check your internet connection.

data.month_start_day: Month cycle start day (1 = calendar month)

confirm_transfer_chain.name: Confirm transfer chain
confirm_transfer_chain.description: Confirm or reject a detected transfer chain.

confirmed.name: Confirmed
confirmed.description: True to confirm, false to reject

initial_sync_pending.title: Personal Bankin: fetch 12-month history
initial_sync_pending.description:
No full transaction history has been downloaded yet. Click **Fix** to fetch the last 12 months (365 days) from your bank now. This uses one of your 4 daily Enable Banking API calls.

Alternatively, clicking **Refresh** in the Personal Bankin panel will also trigger the backfill automatically.

init.title: Fetch 12-month transaction history
init.description:
This will fetch 365 days of transactions from your linked bank accounts. The process runs in the background and may take a few seconds.

Click **Submit** to start.

restart_required.title: Finance Update — Restart Required
restart_required.description: Finance has been updated to version {version}. A restart is required to apply the new version.

init.title: Restart Home Assistant
init.description:
Finance has been updated to version {version}. Home Assistant must be restarted to apply the update.

Click **Submit** to restart now.

reconfigure_required.title: Finance: Reconfiguration Required
reconfigure_required.description: Finance has switched from GoCardless to Enable Banking. Please reconfigure with your Enable Banking credentials via Settings > Integrations.

credentials_missing.title: Finance: API Credentials Missing
credentials_missing.description: No Enable Banking API credentials are stored. The integration cannot fetch banking data until you reconfigure it via Settings > Devices & Services.

credentials_invalid_pem.title: Finance: Invalid Private Key
credentials_invalid_pem.description: The stored Enable Banking private key could not be loaded. Reconfigure the integration via Settings > Devices & Services and paste the full PEM key including the BEGIN/END lines.
